envelope_defaults.human_readable_summary: Dandelion maps the territory. Admins approve the map. Foundation governs what can happen inside the map. DMWs scope what can be remembered. Digital Twins operate within the approved terrain.
envelope_defaults.model_usage_notes: Reviews are PROPOSED_NOT_REVIEWED. Approval chains gate downstream write authority. No managerial-oversight monitoring inferences during review.

items.name: Org / Relationship Map Governance Review
items.description: Surfaces D3 Org / Relationship Map recommendation regions for admin review. Approval chains + escalation paths require Otzar Administrator approval. Confidential relationships excluded at assessment remain absolute through review.
items.human_readable_summary: Admin walks role-shaped relationship regions and decides per-region outcome. Approval chains gate downstream write authority. Confidential relationships excluded at intake remain absolute.
items.model_usage_notes: Approval chains rank first because they gate write authority. Escalation paths rank second. Dotted-line relationships can be deferred per company maturity.
escalation_path: Executive Sponsor → Founder (for cross-org executive-support cases)
DMW_scope_implications: Approved Org Map bounds Team / Hive-scoped DMW memory
Confidential relationships REJECT outcome excluded from any downstream DMW
Approval-path relationships inform Authority Map DMW scope at D5
governance_review_points: Admin must approve every Org Map region before downstream Authority Map approval can land
No workforce-scoring inferences from reporting structure during review
Executive-support regions require dual-control to prevent confused-deputy escalation
